name: Crockpot Italian Sausage Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces garbanzo beans or chick pea beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage.
2. Combine all ingredients except zucchini in the crockpot.
3. Cook on low for 7-9 hours.
4. Add zucchini and cook an additional 30 minutes.
